/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/embedding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/golden_evaluator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/graphification.cpp.o CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/hypergraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/isolate_islands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/overlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/K_SpecPart.dir/src/specpart.cpp.o -o K_SpecPart
